src/app/(app)/opportunities/[id]/review/: Public token-scoped review link. No auth by design — the unguessable token IS the credential. The query keys exclusively on opportunityReviewRequests.token, so cross-tenant access requires forging a token, which it can't (random uuid).
Same token-scoped pattern as getReviewRequestByTokenAction. The token both authenticates and scopes the operation.
src/app/(app)/admin/errors/actions.ts:ac: Platform-wide superadmin operation on production_error (ops data, not tenant data). Gated by requireSuperadmin(); the row's id is the lookup key. Cross-tenant view is the intended behavior of the /admin/errors triage surface.
src/app/(app)/admin/errors/actions.ts:re: Platform-wide superadmin operation on production_error. Same rationale as acknowledgeErrorAction.
src/app/(app)/admin/errors/actions.ts:un: Platform-wide superadmin operation on production_error. Same rationale as acknowledgeErrorAction.
src/app/(app)/admin/errors/actions.ts:up: Platform-wide superadmin operation on production_error. Same rationale as acknowledgeErrorAction.
